title: Planning Under Uncertainty
thesis: Good planning separates prediction from preparation while preserving uncertainty.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.body: Planning under uncertainty begins by distinguishing prediction from preparation [C1].

sections.heading: Method
sections.body: Scenario comparison gives a repeatable method for evaluating alternatives [C2].

sections.heading: Discussion
sections.body: The method structures response, but it does not remove uncertainty [C3].

open_tensions: Scenario comparison structures response without eliminating uncertainty.
